title: BAC Calculator - Blood Alcohol Content
warning: ⚠️ This is an estimate only. Do NOT drink and drive. Actual BAC depends on many factors.
seoDescription: Free online BAC calculator. Estimate your blood alcohol content based on weight, gender, drinks, and time. Educational tool about alcohol metabolism and safety.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the BAC Calculator
step1Desc: Enter your weight, select gender, and input the number of standard drinks consumed.
step2Desc: Enter the number of hours since your first drink. BAC decreases approximately 0.015% per hour.
step3Desc: Your estimated BAC is displayed with a status indicator. Remember: this is an estimate only.
faq1A: This is an estimate based on the Widmark formula. Actual BAC varies with metabolism, food intake, and individual factors.
faq2A: One standard drink = 12oz beer (5%), 5oz wine (12%), or 1.5oz spirits (40%). All contain about 14g of pure alcohol.
faq3Q: How long until BAC reaches zero?
faq3A: The liver metabolizes about one standard drink per hour. Use the calculator to estimate your current BAC level.
